title: Fix send button clipping in chat input area

requirements.text: Fix the send button in the MessageInput component so it is fully visible and not clipped or cut off. Ensure the input area layout provides sufficient padding, minimum width, and flex constraints so the send button always renders completely within bounds without overflow or truncation.

quotes: The send button in the chat input area is being cut off due to improper spacing.

acceptanceCriteria: The send button is fully visible in the chat input area at all viewport sizes
No part of the send button is clipped, hidden, or overflowing its container
The input textarea and send button coexist in the same row without overlapping
Existing functionality (text input, character counter, GIF/image/voice buttons) remains unchanged

constraints: Do not alter the light gray (bg-muted) background or borderless styling of the chat input textarea
Do not modify the circular character counter appearance or behavior
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Redesigning the chat input layout beyond fixing the send button visibility
Changes to any other component outside MessageInput.tsx
